EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IZ2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to additional members that identify geometric objects that can have 3D coordinates and defines operations on such objects.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("473B374D-0F02-461A-B60E-070045C6110B")]
public interface IZ2 : IZ, IZCollection
